title: Creating Generative Art Dynamic NFTs with Google Cloud Vertex AI and Chainlink Functions
description:
This is a self-paced lab that takes place in the Google Cloud console.

Learn to integrate Vertex, Google Cloud's AI suite into your smart contracts.
 

In this lab, you'll mint a new NFT collection that can be dynamically updated based on their attributes and using generative AI using the Vertex APIs accessed with Chainlink Functions.
